metadata.title: Blanquette de Veau
metadata.description: A classic French veal stew with creamy sauce and vegetables
metadata.author: Philippe Etchebest

steps.action: Blanch the veal in cold water
Peel all the vegetables
Cut the carrots, onions, leek, and garlic
Remove impurities from the broth
Add vegetables, bay leaf, and thyme to the broth
Season with salt and pepper, squeeze lemon juice
Simmer gently for about 1.5 hours
Strain the broth through a chinois
Make a roux in a high-sided pan
Gradually incorporate a portion of the broth to thicken the sauce
Cook over low heat until the sauce coats the back of a spoon
Reduce the remaining broth in a separate pan
Incorporate the reduced broth into the sauce
Whisk the cream for 5 minutes to make whipped cream
Add a dash of lemon juice to thicken the cream
Season the sauce with Espelette pepper, salt, and pepper
Incorporate the seasoned sauce into the whipped cream
Heat oil in a pan
Sear the mushrooms until caramelized
Add the meat and mushrooms to the sauce
Cut the cooked carrots into large pieces
Chop the chives and add to the sauce with lemon zest
Serve and enjoy!
